tasks.title: Client Kickoff and Delivery Plan
tasks.description: Sprint scope, owners, and timeline confirmed with client.

tasks.title: Landing Wireframe to Build Handoff
tasks.description: Wireframe handoff is queued again and pending restart.

tasks.title: Design Tokens and CTA Variants
tasks.description: Color, spacing, and button variants are pending and queued in backlog.

tasks.title: Landing Core Build and CMS Wiring
tasks.description: Hero and core sections are delivered; final CMS wiring is still in progress.

tasks.title: Auth Session Endpoint and Token Refresh
tasks.description: Session endpoint and refresh strategy merged and deployed.

tasks.title: Paid Ads Brief and Channel Hypothesis
tasks.description: Campaign goals are defined; channel split is being refined with new assumptions.

tasks.title: QA Smoke Pass on Main Funnel
tasks.description: Critical path smoke checks completed with baseline report.

tasks.title: Midday Client Sync and Scope Reconfirm
tasks.description: Client accepted progress and requested softer CTA tone.

tasks.title: Final Landing Copy Iteration
tasks.description: Applying final hero + CTA copy updates requested by client.

tasks.title: Staging Pagination Hotfix for QA
tasks.description: Hotfix deployed to staging, awaiting QA validation cycle.

tasks.title: Regression Cycle 2 on Staging
tasks.description: Waiting for stable staging seed to start full regression rerun.

tasks.title: Creative Final Review for Ads and Social
tasks.description: Final visual check in progress before export and handoff to marketing.

tasks.title: Campaign Budget Model and Scenario Split
tasks.description: Finalize budget model after creative and conversion assumptions are confirmed.

tasks.title: Onboarding Email Flow Draft
tasks.description: Draft lifecycle onboarding emails for first-week activation.

tasks.title: Analytics Event Mapping Review
tasks.description: Review and document event naming consistency across funnel steps.

tasks.title: Help Center Article Outline
tasks.description: Prepare initial article structure for common setup questions.

tasks.title: Signup Form Validation Tightening
tasks.description: Improve validation rules and field-level feedback in onboarding form.

tasks.title: Dashboard KPI Refresh Tuning
tasks.description: Reduce stale KPI windows and align refresh cadence with API cache.

tasks.title: Agent Prompt Cleanup Pass
tasks.description: Clean duplicated prompt instructions and tighten role boundaries.

tasks.title: Metrics Export CSV Endpoint
tasks.description: Expose CSV export endpoint for weekly board metrics snapshots.

tasks.title: Office Avatar Assignment Audit
tasks.description: Audit avatar collisions and fix duplicate assignments in office view.

tasks.title: Release Notes Template Refresh
tasks.description: Refresh release-note template with clearer risk and rollback sections.

tasks.title: Payment Copy Legal Check
tasks.description: Pending legal sign-off on payment copy before go-live.

tasks.title: Webhook Retry Policy Hardening
tasks.description: Tune retry windows and dead-letter handling for intermittent webhook failures.

comments.body: Need clear hourly timeline and main risks for today.
Timeline sent: design 10:30, landing build 14:30, QA regression 17:30, final review 18:30.
Landing almost ready. Still need final CTA copy and testimonial block adjustment.
Perfect. Priority: softer CTA and keep the approachable tone.
Pagination hotfix deployed to staging. Need QA validation to close.
Still blocked: staging seed is inconsistent between runs.
Received. Morgan and Brian, block 30 minutes to stabilize seed and notify QA.
Reviewing creative variants for ads and social. Waiting for final marketing feedback.
Feedback sent: use problem->result approach on first slide and agenda CTA.
Need two budget scenarios: conservative and aggressive.
Leaving first version with assumptions and expected CPA per channel.
